ChaosExperimentAction.description: Model that represents the base action model. 9 total per experiment.

name.description: String that represents a Capability URN.

ChaosExperimentBranch.description: Model that represents a branch in the step. 9 total per experiment.

ChaosExperimentStep.description: Model that represents a step in the Experiment resource.

ChaosTargetFilter.description: Model that represents available filter types that can be applied to a targets list.

ChaosTargetListSelector.description: Model that represents a list selector.

ChaosTargetQuerySelector.description: Model that represents a query selector.

queryString.description: Azure Resource Graph (ARG) Query Language query for target resources.

subscriptionIds.description: Subscription id list to scope resource query.

ChaosTargetSelector.description: Model that represents a selector in the Experiment resource.

filter.description: Model that represents available filter types that can be applied to a targets list.

ChaosTargetSimpleFilter.description: Model that represents a simple target filter.

parameters.description: Model that represents the Simple filter parameters.

ChaosTargetSimpleFilterParameters.description: Model that represents the Simple filter parameters.

zones.description: List of Azure availability zones to filter targets by.

ConfigurationExclusions.description:
Model that represents exclusion criteria for protecting resources from fault injection.
Uses union (OR) logic - a resource is excluded if it matches ANY criteria.

resources.description: Array of specific resource IDs to exclude from fault injection.

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

tags.description: Array of tag key-value pairs. Resources with matching tags are excluded.

types.description: Array of resource types. All resources of these types are excluded.

ConfigurationFilters.description:
Model that represents filter criteria for constraining which discovered
resources participate in fault injection.

Uses intersection (AND) logic — a resource is included only if it matches all criteria.

locations.description:
Array of Azure location strings. Only resources in these locations are included.

Null or omitted means all locations (no filter). Empty array means include nothing.

zones.description:
Array of availability zone identifiers ("1", "2", "3", "zone-redundant").
Only resources whose zones intersect this list are included.

Null or omitted means all zones (including non-zonal). Empty array means include nothing.

Mutually exclusive with `physicalZones` — set one or the other, not both.

physicalZones.description:
Array of physical availability zone identifiers in `{region}-az{N}` format
(e.g., `"westus2-az1"`). Only resources in the corresponding logical zone
for each subscription are included.

At execution time, each physical zone is resolved to per-subscription
logical zones via the ARM locations API. The resolved mapping is surfaced
on the scenario run response (`zoneResolution`).

Null or omitted means physical zone targeting is not used.
Only one physical zone is supported in preview.

Mutually exclusive with `zones` — set one or the other, not both.

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ExperimentExecutionProperties.description: Model that represents the execution properties of an Experiment.

startedAt.description: String that represents the start date time.

stoppedAt.description: String that represents the stop date time.

provisioningState.description: Resource provisioning state. Not currently in use for executions.

value.description: The Experiment items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: Most recent provisioning state for the given experiment resource.

customerDataStorage.description: Optional customer-managed Storage account where Experiment schema will be stored.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

ExternalResource.description: Model that represents an external resource reference.

resourceId.description: The resource ID of the external resource.

FilterType.description: Enum that discriminates between filter types. Currently only `Simple` type is supported.

FixResourcePermissionsRequest.description: Request body for fixing resource permissions.

whatIf.description: Optional value that indicates whether to run a "dry run" of fixing resource permissions.

KeyValuePair.description: A map used to describe parameters for actions or configurations.

key.description: The name of the setting for the action.

value.description: The value of the setting for the action.

OperationError.description: Represents a system or infrastructure error encountered during an async operation.

errorCode.description: The error code identifying the type of system error.

errorMessage.description: A human-readable description of the system error.

PermissionError.description: Model that represents the permission error.

resourceId.description: The resource id for the affected resource.

PermissionsFix.description: Model that represents the fix resource permissions result.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

PermissionsFixProperties.description: Model that represents the properties of the permission fix operation.

startedAt.description: The permission fix UTC start time.

completedAt.description: The permission fix UTC end time.

whatIfMode.description: Whether this was a what-if (dry run) operation.

roleAssignments.description: The list of role assignment results.

summary.description: Summary of the permission fix operation.

PermissionsFixState.description: Enum of the permission fix state.

values.name: NotStarted
values.description: The permission fix has not started.

values.name: InProgress
values.description: The permission fix is in progress.

values.name: PartiallySucceeded
values.description: Some role assignments succeeded and some failed.

PermissionsFixSummary.description: Summary of the permission fix operation.

totalRequired.description: Total number of role assignments required.

skipped.description: Number of skipped role assignments (already existed).

PhysicalToLogicalZoneMapping.description: Maps a physical zone to the resolved logical zone for a given subscription.

logicalZone.description:
The logical availability zone resolved for this subscription
(e.g., `"1"`, `"2"`, `"3"`).

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

privateEndpointConnections.description: A readonly collection of private endpoint connection. Currently only one endpoint connection is supported.

groupId.description: The private link resource group id.

requiredMembers.description: The private link resource required member names.

requiredZoneNames.description: The private link resource private link DNS zone name.

provisioningState.description: Resource provisioning state. Not currently in use.

PrivateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: A collection of information about the state of the connection between service consumer and provider.

status.description: Indicates whether the connection has been Approved/Rejected/Removed by the owner of the service.

description.description: The reason for approval/rejection of the connection.

actionsRequired.description: A message indicating if changes on the service provider require any updates on the consumer.

ProvisioningState.description: Current provisioning state for a given Azure Chaos resource.

PublicNetworkAccessOption.description: Public Network Access Control for PrivateAccess resource.

Recommendation.description: Model that represents a scenario recommendation.

evaluationRunAt.description: The UTC time when the recommendation was evaluated.

RecommendationStatus.description: Enum of the scenario validation state.

values.name: NotEvaluated
values.description: The scenario recommendation status has not been evaluated.

values.name: Recommended
values.description: The scenario recommendation status is recommended.

values.name: NotApplicable
values.description: The scenario recommendation status is not applicable.

values.name: Evaluating
values.description: The scenario recommendation status is currently being evaluated.

values.name: EvaluationFailed
values.description: The scenario recommendation evaluation has failed.

values.name: EvaluationCancelled
values.description: The scenario recommendation evaluation was cancelled.

ResourceStateError.description: Model that represents the resource state error.

resourceId.description: The resource id for the affected resource.

RoleAssignmentError.description: Error details for a failed role assignment.

RoleAssignmentResult.description: Result of a single role assignment operation.

roleDefinitionId.description: The Azure RBAC role definition ID.

scope.description: The scope at which the role was/will be assigned.

status.description: The status of the role assignment operation.

roleAssignmentId.description: The created role assignment resource ID (null if failed or what-if mode).

error.description: Error details if the assignment failed.

RoleAssignmentStatus.description: Enum of the role assignment status.

values.name: Skipped
values.description: The role assignment was skipped (already exists).

values.name: Pending
values.description: The role assignment is pending (what-if mode).

behavior.description: Defines how multiple dependencies are evaluated.

values.name: Any
values.description: Always continues after all dependencies (like a finally block).

values.name: All
values.description: All dependencies must be satisfied to continue.

values.name: AtLeastOne
values.description: At least one dependency must be satisfied to continue.

properties.description: The properties of scenario.

ScenarioAction.description: Model that represents a scenario action.

actionId.description: Identifier of the action and version (e.g., "microsoft-compute-shutdown/1.0").

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does.

duration.description: ISO 8601 duration for how long the action runs (e.g., PT30M for 30 minutes).

parameters.description: Action-specific parameters.

runAfter.description: Action dependencies that control when this action starts.

waitBefore.description: ISO 8601 duration to wait before action starts (e.g., PT30S for 30 seconds).

timeout.description: ISO 8601 duration for maximum action execution time (for actions without inherent duration).

externalResource.description: External resource reference for the action.

properties.description: The properties of scenario definition.

ScenarioConfigurationListResult.description: Model that represents a list of scenario configurations and a link for pagination.

value.description: The ScenarioConfiguration items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ScenarioConfigurationProperties.description: Model that represents the properties of the scenario configuration.

scenarioId.description: Resource ID of the scenario this configuration applies to.

parameters.description: Runtime parameter values for the scenario. Keys must match parameter names defined in the scenario.

exclusions.description: Exclusion criteria for protecting resources from fault injection.

provisioningState.description: Most recent provisioning state for the given scenario resource.

filters.description: Filter criteria used to constrain which discovered resources participate in fault injection.

ScenarioErrors.description: Model that represents the scenario run errors.

errorCode.description: Error code for internal server errors.

errorMessage.description: Error message for internal server errors.

permission.description: Any permission errors associated with the scenario run.

resource.description: Any resource state errors associated with the scenario run.

ScenarioEvaluationResultItem.description: Model that represents a single scenario evaluation result.

scenarioName.description: The name of the scenario that was evaluated.

evaluationResult.description: The evaluation result for this scenario.

ScenarioListResult.description: Model that represents a list of scenarios and a link for pagination.

value.description: The Scenario items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ScenarioParameter.description: Model that represents a single scenario parameter definition.

ScenarioProperties.description: Model that represents the properties of the scenario.

provisioningState.description: Most recent provisioning state for the given scenario resource.

createdFrom.description: Resource ID of the template version this scenario was created from (optional).

description.description: Description of what this scenario does (optional).

parameters.description: Parameter definitions for the scenario.

actions.description: Array of actions that define the scenario's orchestration.

recommendation.description: The recommendation information for this scenario.

ScenarioRun.description: Model that represents the scenario run.

properties.description: The properties of scenario run.

ScenarioRunListResult.description: Model that represents a list of scenario runs and a link for pagination.

value.description: The ScenarioRun items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ScenarioRunProperties.description: Model that represents the properties of the scenario run.

managedIdentityPrincipalId.description: The principal id for the managed identity used for the run.

resources.description: All resources discovered for the scenario run.

errors.description: System or infrastructure errors encountered during the scenario run.

executionErrors.description: Business errors from fault injection — permission and resource state issues.

startTime.description: When the scenario run was started.

endTime.description: When the scenario run was completed.

zoneResolution.description:
Zone resolution information. Present when the scenario configuration
used physical zone targeting (`physicalZones`). Contains the mode,
requested physical zones, and per-subscription logical zone mappings.

ScenarioRunResource.description: Model that represents the scenario run resource.

ScenarioRunState.description: Enum of the scenario run state.

values.name: Queued
values.description: The scenario run has been queued and is waiting to start.

values.name: Resolving
values.description: The scenario run is in the process of being resolved.

values.name: Generating
values.description: The scenario run is in the process of being generated.

values.name: Validating
values.description: The scenario run is in the process of being validated.

values.name: ValidationSucceeded
values.description: The scenario run validation has completed successfully.

values.name: Starting
values.description: The scenario run is in the process of being started.

values.name: SettingUp
values.description: The scenario run is in the process of being setup.

values.name: Running
values.description: The scenario run is in the process of running.

values.name: Canceling
values.description: The scenario run is in the process of being canceled.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The scenario run has been canceled.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The scenario run has completed successfully.

ScenarioRunSummaryAction.description: Model that represents the scenario run action.

resources.description: The resources associated with the specified action.

actionUrn.description: The urn for the given chaos action.

ScenarioSummaryState.description: Enum of the scenario run summary action state.

values.name: Pending
values.description: The action is pending and has not started.

values.name: Starting
values.description: The action is in the process of starting.

values.name: Running
values.description: The action is in the process of running.

values.name: Stopping
values.description: The action is in the process of stopping.

values.name: Canceling
values.description: The action is in the process of being canceled.

values.name: FailingOnError
values.description: The action is failing due to an error.

ScenarioValidationState.description: Enum of the scenario validation state.

values.name: Resolving
values.description: The scenario validation is in a resolving state.

values.name: Generating
values.description: The scenario validation is in a generating state.

values.name: Validating
values.description: The scenario validation is in a validating state.

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The scenario validation has been accepted.

values.name: NotStarted
values.description: The scenario validation has not yet started.

values.name: RequiresAttention
values.description:
The scenario validation reflects a state that requires attention.
This is a terminal failure state indicating validation issues were found.

values.name: NoResolvedResources
values.description:
The scenario validation found no valid resources to perform fault behaviors against.
This is a terminal failure state.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The scenario validation completed successfully and the scenario is ready to execute.

StepStatus.description: Model that represents the a list of branches and branch statuses.

status.description: The value of the status of the step.

resourceTypes.description: List of resource types this Target Type can extend.

ValidationProperties.description: Model that represents the properties of the scenario validation.

startTime.description: The scenario validation UTC start time.

executionPlanJson.description: Execution plan created from validation. This plan will be executed as-is on next scenario execution.

endTime.description: The scenario validation UTC end time.

errors.description: System or infrastructure errors encountered during validation.

Workspace.description: Model that represents a Workspace resource.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

properties.description: The properties of the Workspace resource.

WorkspaceDiscovery.description: Model that represents the latest workspace discovery result.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

WorkspaceDiscoveryProperties.description: Model that represents the properties of the workspace discovery.

errors.description: System or infrastructure errors encountered during discovery.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID this discovery belongs to.

WorkspaceDiscoveryStatus.description: Enum of the workspace discovery status.

values.name: Pending
values.description: The discovery is pending and has not started.

values.name: Queued
values.description: The discovery has been accepted and is queued for execution.

WorkspaceEvaluation.description: Model that represents the latest workspace evaluation result.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

WorkspaceEvaluationProperties.description: Model that represents the properties of the workspace evaluation.

errors.description: System or infrastructure errors encountered during evaluation.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID this evaluation belongs to.

numScenariosToEvaluate.description: The number of scenarios to evaluate.

numScenariosEvaluatedSucceeded.description: The number of scenarios that evaluated successfully.

numScenariosEvaluatedFailed.description: The number of scenarios that failed evaluation.

numScenariosEvaluatedCancelled.description: The number of scenarios that were cancelled during evaluation.

WorkspaceEvaluationStatus.description: Enum of the workspace evaluation status.

values.name: Pending
values.description: The evaluation is pending and has not started.

values.name: Queued
values.description: The evaluation has been accepted and is queued for execution.

values.name: PartiallySucceeded
values.description: The evaluation partially succeeded — some scenarios succeeded while others failed.

WorkspaceListResult.description: Model that represents a list of Workspace resources and a link for pagination.

value.description: The Workspace items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

WorkspaceProperties.description: Model that represents the Workspace properties model.

provisioningState.description: Most recent provisioning state for the given Workspace resource.

scopes.description: The intended workspace-level resource scope to be used by child scenarios.

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

ZoneResolutionInfo.description:
Information about how physical zones were resolved to logical zones
for each subscription during scenario execution.

mode.description:
The zone targeting mode used for this run.
`logical` — customer specified logical zone identifiers directly.
`physical` — customer specified physical zone identifiers; the system
resolved them to per-subscription logical zones at execution time.

requestedPhysicalZones.description:
The physical zone identifiers requested by the customer in the
scenario configuration (e.g., `["westus2-az1"]`).
Empty array when `mode` is `logical`.

subscriptionZoneMappings.description:
Per-subscription zone resolution results. Each entry maps a subscription
to the logical zone resolved from the requested physical zone.
Empty when `mode` is `logical`.

ZoneResolutionMapping.description: Maps a single subscription to its physical-to-logical zone resolutions.

zoneMappings.description: The physical-to-logical zone mappings for this subscription.

ZoneResolutionMode.description: The zone resolution mode for a scenario run.

values.name: Logical
values.description: Logical zone mode — customer specified logical zone identifiers directly.

values.name: Physical
values.description:
Physical zone mode — system resolved physical zones to per-subscription
logical zones at execution time.
